global.accountCenterSubtitle: Quan ly cac trai nghiem da ket noi va cai dat tai khoan cua ban tren toan bo cong nghe Ordnary.

nav.permissions: Thong tin va quyen cua ban

profiles.title: Ho so
profiles.description: Quan ly cac trai nghiem da ket noi va cai dat tai khoan cua ban tren toan bo cong nghe Ordnary.

titles.registrationBirthday: Ngay sinh cua ban la khi nao?
titles.registrationReview: Hoan tat viec tao tai khoan
titles.editEmail: Dia chi email cua ban la gi?
titles.recoveryCodeEntry: Xac nhan tai khoan cua ban

descriptions.identifierLookup: Nhap email cua ban de dang nhap vao tai khoan Ordnary hoac tao tai khoan moi.
descriptions.passwordEntry: De dang nhap, hay nhap mat khau gan voi {identifier}.
descriptions.accountNotFound: Chung toi khong tim thay tai khoan Ordnary cho {email}. Co the ban chua tao tai khoan. Neu da tao, tai khoan co the dang dung mot dinh danh khac.
descriptions.registrationName: Ten nay se duoc dung de khoi phuc tai khoan va lien lac lien quan den tai khoan cua ban. Ten nay se khong hien thi cong khai.
descriptions.registrationBirthday: Hay dung ngay sinh that cua ban, ngay ca khi tai khoan nay dung cho doanh nghiep hay muc dich khac. Thong tin nay se khong cong khai.
descriptions.registrationPassword: Tao mat khau co it nhat 6 ky tu. Mat khau nen la thu ma nguoi khac khong de doan duoc.
descriptions.saveLoginInfo: Chung toi se luu thong tin dang nhap de ban khong phai nhap lai vao lan sau.
descriptions.verifyEmailCode: Nhap ma 6 chu so da duoc gui den {identifier} de xac nhan tai khoan cua ban.
descriptions.editEmail: Nhap dia chi email ma chung toi co the lien he voi ban. Dia chi nay se duoc dung cho dang nhap va quan ly tai khoan, va se khong hien thi cong khai.
descriptions.loginCodeEntry: De dang nhap, hay nhap ma chung toi da gui den {identifier}. Ban co the can kiem tra thu muc spam hoac xa hoi.
descriptions.recoveryCodeEntry: Chung toi da gui mot ma den {identifier}. Nhap ma do de xac nhan tai khoan cua ban.
descriptions.resetPassword: Ban se dung mat khau nay de dang nhap vao Tai khoan Ordnary cua minh. Hay dung it nhat 6 chu cai va so.

labels.name: Ten
labels.logoutOthers: Dang xuat o moi noi khac de dam bao khong ai khac con co the truy cap vao tai khoan cua ban
labels.marketingEmails: Toi muon nhan email ve ung dung, goi y va uu dai cho Ordnary Identity.

links.whyNeedBirthday: Tai sao toi can cung cap ngay sinh?
links.noAccessEmail: Ban khong con truy cap duoc dia chi email nay nua?

messages.nameHelp: Su dung ten that giup viec khoi phuc tai khoan de dang hon neu ban mat quyen truy cap.
messages.emailHelp: Su dung email cong viec hoac ca nhan de truy cap cac dich vu Ordnary.
messages.summaryPrivacy: Thong tin chi tiet tai khoan Ordnary cua ban khong cong khai.
messages.verifyEmailLookFor: Hay tim email tu notification@ordnary.com. Ban co the can kiem tra ca thu muc spam hoac xa hoi.
messages.termsAgreement: Bang cach nhap "Hoan tat", ban dong y voi Dieu khoan dich vu, Chinh sach quyen rieng tu va xac nhan rang ban da doc Chinh sach cookie cua chung toi.
messages.footerAgreement: Bang cach tiep tuc, ban xac nhan rang ban da doc va dong y voi Dieu khoan dich vu, Chinh sach quyen rieng tu va cac huong dan xu ly du lieu ap dung. Ban dong thoi dong y nhan cac thong bao thiet yeu ve tai khoan va bao mat lien quan den viec su dung nen tang.
messages.emailMissing: Dia chi email la bat buoc.
messages.resendCodeError: Da xay ra loi khong mong doi khi gui lai ma.
messages.invalidInput: Du lieu nhap khong hop le.
messages.credentialsPrompt: De dang nhap, hay nhap mat khau gan voi {identifier}.
messages.checkEmailPrompt: De dang nhap, hay nhap ma chung toi da gui den {identifier}.
messages.termsIntro: Bang cach cham Hoan tat, ban dong y voi

validation.passwordMax: Mat khau khong duoc vuot qua 128 ky tu.

validation.displayNameMin: Ten hien thi phai co it nhat 2 ky tu.
validation.resetTokenRequired: Token dat lai la bat buoc.
validation.verificationTokenRequired: Token xac minh la bat buoc.
